title: Agent Provider Recovery
objective: Prove a transient provider failure is contained and provider recovery produces a normal assistant response in the same OpenClaw env/session lifecycle.

phases.title: Provision Agent Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before wiring the transient-failure mock provider.

phases.title: Transient Provider Recovery Turn
phases.intent: Send a simple message while the first provider request returns a transient error and require OpenClaw to recover to a normal assistant response.
commands: ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-provider-recovery --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 120 --json

phases.title: Recovery Provider Turn
phases.intent: Send a second message after the transient provider failure and require a normal assistant response.
commands: ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-provider-recovery --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 120 --json

phases.title: Post-Failure Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after provider failure and recovery.
